SELECT [r1].[Id], [r1].[Label], [s].[Id], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[RoleId], [s].[Id0], [s].[BelongsTo], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [r].[Id], [r].[Label]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[Label] = @__role_0
) AS [r1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[Id], [r0].[PolicyId], [r0].[RoleId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[BelongsTo], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r1].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]

SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[Label], [s].[Id], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[RoleId], [s].[Id0], [s].[BelongsTo], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM [Roles] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[Id], [r0].[PolicyId], [r0].[RoleId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[BelongsTo], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [r].[Id], [s].[Id]
2025-05-06 16:17:36.612 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[BelongsTo], [p].[Description], [p].[Name], [p0].[Id], [p0].[BelongsTo], [p0].[Description], [p0].[Name]
FROM [Policies] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [Policies] AS [p0] ON [p].[Id] = [p0].[BelongsTo]

SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[Label], [s].[Id], [s].[PolicyId], [s].[RoleId], [s].[Id0], [s].[BelongsTo], [s].[Description], [s].[Name]
FROM [Roles] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[Id], [r0].[PolicyId], [r0].[RoleId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[BelongsTo], [p].[Description], [p].[Name]
    FROM [RolePolicies] AS [r0]
    INNER JOIN [Policies] AS [p] ON [r0].[PolicyId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [r].[Id] = [s].[RoleId]

FROM [Roles] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN (

LEFT JOIN (
